meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Version Control: Antigravity Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and build your first professional SaaS app.
content.answer_block: Version control is the lifeblood of software engineering. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you gain an immutable audit trail for your codebase. This setup, paired with Claude Code, automates commit history and branch management, ensuring your student projects are production-ready, scalable, and protected against accidental data loss.
content.intro:
You’re deep in the flow state, hacking away at your first major project, when disaster strikes: a rogue line of code crashes your entire build. You try to undo, but the history is gone. The panic sets in—hours of work, vanished into the ether. This is the reality of coding without version control, a rite of passage that stalls more student developers than any complex algorithm.

But here is the secret: you don't have to live in fear of your own keyboard. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard scaffolding designed to bake version control into your workflow from the very first commit. By combining this with the power of Claude Code, you transition from a student who 'writes code' to an engineer who 'ships software'.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project structure that enforces strict directory standards and git integration from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with strict Git hooks for pre-commit linting and automated versioning.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code CLI
steps.description: Connect your local development environment to the Claude Code agent for intelligent, context-aware command execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Claude Code to monitor the /src directory and suggest semantic commit messages based on changes.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Commits
steps.description: Break your feature development into small, logical pieces that are easily reversible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my current progress into atomic chunks, ensuring each commit represents exactly one functional unit of the feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'feat: implement initial auth flow'

steps.title: Automate Branch Hygiene
steps.description: Use automated workflows to ensure your main branch remains deployable at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a branch protection workflow that requires a Claude Code review before merging feature branches into main.

steps.title: Verify Deployment Integrity
steps.description: Perform a final audit of your project structure to ensure all version history is correctly logged and accessible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a diagnostic on the repository to verify that all commit history conforms to the Antigravity versioning standard.

pro_tips: Always commit before running any 'npm install' or package updates to ensure you have a clean state to revert to.
Use semantic commit prefixes like 'fix:', 'feat:', and 'chore:' to make your history readable for future recruiters.
Keep your feature branches short-lived; merge them within 48 hours to avoid 'merge hell' during your build process.
Ignore your 'node_modules' folder immediately; use a standard .gitignore template to keep your repo size manageable.
Treat your commit messages as technical documentation for your future self—explain the 'why', not just the 'what'.
resources: Git Best Practices for Students: https://git-scm.com/doc
The AI Builder Community Hub: https://aibuilder.community
content.next_steps: Once your project is version-controlled, focus on deploying your first build to a cloud provider like Vercel or Railway to see your work live on the internet.
content.conversion_block: Stop treating code as a disposable script and start building a professional software portfolio that speaks for itself. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to bypass the common pitfalls of your peers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
